Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zachary Lopes, Esq. and Peter Hoffmann, Esq. 925-609-1699 of Rains Lucia Stern St. Phalle & Silver P.C. for Petitioner.
Jennifer Stoughton, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-4267 for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Petitioner requests an order to temporarily restrain Respondent from further violations of policy. Respondent argues. The Court announces it is not comfortable issuing a tro today and requests for a supplemental on arbitration timeframe, factual presentation for 11/27 and 12/16 Association claims, and what is going to happen between now and then. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Order to Show Cause re: Temporary Restraining Order is continued for an Order to Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction on January 31, 2017 at 9:30 am. Opening brief - 1/10/18, Opposition - 1/19/18, Any reply 1/26/18.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
